testcase.name: savesAndFindsUserWithBaseServiceMethods

testcase.name: deletesUserById
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-16T14:51:23.070+03:00 DEBUG 2360611 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,password_hash,updated_at,username,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) 2026-06-16T14:51:23.071+03:00 DEBUG 2360611 --- [ main] jdbc.sqltiming : org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.internal.ResultSetReturnImpl.executeUpdate(ResultSetReturnImpl.java:185) 14. insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,password_hash,updated_at,username,version,id) values (2026-06-16T11:51:23.070226211Z,'service-delete@example.com',1,'hashed-password',2026-06-16T11:51:23.070226211Z,'service-delete',0,default) {executed in 0 msec} 2026-06-16T14:51:23.072+03:00 DEBUG 2360611 --- [ main] jdbc.sqltiming : org.hibernate.id.insert.GetGeneratedKeysDelegate.extractGeneratedValues(GetGeneratedKeysDelegate.java:128) 14. getGeneratedKeys on query: insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,password_hash,updated_at,username,version,id) values (2026-06-16T11:51:23.070226211Z,'service-delete@example.com',1,'hashed-password',2026-06-16T11:51:23.070226211Z,'service-delete',0,default) {executed in 0 msec} 2026-06-16T14:51:23.072+03:00 INFO 2360611 --- [ main] jdbc.resultsettable : |---| |id | |---| |2 | |---|

testcase.name: findsAndChecksUsersByUsernameAndEmail
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-16T14:51:23.097+03:00 DEBUG 2360611 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,password_hash,updated_at,username,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) 2026-06-16T14:51:23.098+03:00 DEBUG 2360611 --- [ main] jdbc.sqltiming : org.hibernate.engine.jdbc.internal.ResultSetReturnImpl.executeUpdate(ResultSetReturnImpl.java:185) 17. insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,password_hash,updated_at,username,version,id) values (2026-06-16T11:51:23.096851837Z,'service-grace@example.com',1,'hashed-password',2026-06-16T11:51:23.096851837Z,'service-grace',0,default) {executed in 0 msec} 2026-06-16T14:51:23.099+03:00 DEBUG 2360611 --- [ main] jdbc.sqltiming : org.hibernate.id.insert.GetGeneratedKeysDelegate.extractGeneratedValues(GetGeneratedKeysDelegate.java:128) 17. getGeneratedKeys on query: insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,password_hash,updated_at,username,version,id) values (2026-06-16T11:51:23.096851837Z,'service-grace@example.com',1,'hashed-password',2026-06-16T11:51:23.096851837Z,'service-grace',0,default) {executed in 1 msec} 2026-06-16T14:51:23.099+03:00 INFO 2360611 --- [ main] jdbc.resultsettable : |---| |id | |---| |3 | |---|
